$comment: Realms orchestra sheet: the desired topology (Sections > Stands > Canisters) for this project's Casals-managed canisters. Each canister references an authorized WASM by `wasm_key` (bare family => latest authorized version). deploy_sheet reconciles by NAME: a stand/canister whose name matches one already registered in Casals reuses that canister (and its bound canister_id) instead of creating a new one — so the names here MUST match the live registrations (see get_tree). Scope: the 3 demo realms + the Casals-deployed infra (installer, realm-registry). Intentionally EXCLUDED: transient provisioning scaffolding (provtest*, casalspilot*), and externally-managed/registered-only infra that Casals does not install (file-registry, marketplace, token, nft, platform-dashboard) — those are registered for reference, not deployed from this sheet. The authorized-WASM catalog itself is managed by publish-build.yml, not here. Regenerate/verify against `icp canister call <casals> get_tree`.
name: realms
description: Realms test-environment orchestra: a Deployments section with one stand per demo realm (Dominion, Agora, Syntropia), each a realm backend + certified-assets frontend; and an Infra section with the Casals-deployed installer and realm-registry.

sections.name: Deployments
sections.description: The demo realms. One stand per realm, each running a realm backend canister plus its certified-assets frontend canister. Post-deploy configuration (runtime flags, identity, codex + extension installs) is applied by the environment's Casals arrangement (see ../arrangements), not by the sheet.

sections.name: Infra
sections.description: Shared infrastructure that Casals deploys for this project. Externally-managed/registered-only canisters (file-registry, marketplace, token, nft, platform-dashboard) are intentionally omitted — they are registered with Casals for reference but not installed from this sheet.

stands.name: realm-registry
stands.description: Realm registry backend + its certified-assets frontend.
